description:
Resolve auto-merge conflict on FN-007 (Galaxy core logic & type alignment). Auto-merge attempted to rebase + resolve 2 times against main and exhausted retries each pass. Branch: `fusion/fn-007`. Worktree: `/home/stephen/Documents/www/EchoesOfAion/.worktrees/pale-quail`. Last merge error: FN-007: git merge --squash failed without producing conflicts (Command failed: git merge --squash "fusion/fn-007"
error: Your local changes to the following files would be overwritten by merge:
	packages/server/tests/migration.test.ts
Please commit your changes or stash them before you merge.
Aborting
) — refusing to treat as a no-op merge.
summary: Successfully resolved the auto-merge conflict blocking FN-007 by completing the squash merge of `fusion/fn-007` into `main`. Fixed pre-existing merge conflict in `game-state.service.ts`, removed outdated test file, and fixed missing type import in `visibility.service.ts`. All quality gates pass: lint passes, all 90 tests pass (including 70 new galaxy tests from FN-007), and typecheck passes. Merge notes saved to task document "merge-notes".

log.action: Auto-recovered orphaned planning task — agent session lost, cleared for re-planning

log.outcome: The specification has critical errors in the merge execution step (merging a branch into itself) and lacks a defined target branch for the merge, which would make the core workflow unexecutable. Additional gaps in step specificity and verification methods for uncommitted changes further block successful completion.

The specification is complete and well-structured for a merge conflict resolution task. It has clear mission alignment, specific verifiable steps, accurate file scope, and rigorous testing/quality gate requirements. All criteria for a low-blast-radius, high-reversibility task are met, with appropriate sizing (S) and review level (1: Plan Only).

log.action: Rebased new worktree branch fusion/fn-014 onto origin/main
Running deterministic merge verification (test [inferred]: pnpm test)
